body_preview: - Assessment Day 130: "3 error runs without FailureObserved events persist in the event stream. The terminal-state script (Day 127) was built to retroactively close these, but some gaps remain." - `yyds state why last-failure` output confirms: "correctly surfaces 3 error runs without FailureObserved events and 1 incomplete run" - Trajectory graph pressure: "
expected_evidence: `src/commands_state.rs` appears in task lineage State events show `FailureObserved` and `RunCompleted` appended with `retroactive: true` in payload Graph pressure "state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count" decreases `yyds state doctor` no longer flags the 3 historical gaps
title: Add a `yyds state reconcile` subcommand to retroactively close historical lifecycle gaps
